ItacPersonItem.Notes: For his motto and emblem, see Amore prigioniero in Delo pp. 40-1. Mathematician and juristconsult, friend of Galileo, joined the Lincei in 1625, see Marta Cavazza, `Marsili, Cesare`, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
